rules.rule: All open-source contributions must follow the forking workflow: fork, clone, branch, push to fork, open PR.
Branch names must follow the pattern: users/[username]/[category]-[entity]-[action].
[category] must be taken from the approved category list.
[username] must be the contributor's GitHub username.
[entity] must identify the model, service, or component being worked on.
[action] must describe what is being done to the entity.
Contributors must not push directly to the official repository.
Branch names must not deviate from the users/[username]/[category]-[entity]-[action] pattern.
Branch names must not use unapproved categories.
